summary: Tested Session-Based Social Integration (Strava for Surfing) - Backend 18/18 tests pass, Frontend working correctly. SessionLogHeader displays location, time, conditions (wave height, wind, tide). 'I Was There' collaboration system fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: post_collaboration.py request_collaboration endpoint was missing user existence check - caused 500 error on FK violation. Added 'if not requester: raise HTTPException(404)' check.
SessionLogHeader component correctly shows: Location, Time (06:30-08:00), Date (Today), Wave Height (4.5ft), Wind (8mph with direction arrow), Tide (rising)
'I Was There' button correctly hidden on own posts, visible on others' posts
Collaborators modal shows 'Session Crew' with GPS verification badges
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/post_collaboration.py - Added user existence check in request_collaboration endpoint

success_rate.frontend: 100% - SessionLogHeader renders correctly with all conditions

seed_data_creation: Test post 52f5510f has session metadata: session_date, wave_height_ft=4.5, wind_speed_mph=8, tide_status=rising, session_start_time=06:30, session_end_time=08:00
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session-Based Social Integration is fully working. SessionLogHeader component displays in Feed.js for posts with session_date. 'I Was There' collaboration endpoints work correctly. The test post 52f5510f-9d0a-428b-99de-2f38b01b4382 has full session metadata for testing.

GET /api/posts.returns: session_date, session_start_time, session_end_time, wave_height_ft, wind_speed_mph, tide_status, collaborators, author_role, spot

Feed.js integration.note: SessionLogHeader renders for posts with session_date or session_start_time or location or spot or wave_height_ft or collaborators

bug_fixed.issue: POST /api/posts/{post_id}/request-collaboration returning 500 error for non-existent users
bug_fixed.root_cause: Missing user existence check before creating PostCollaboration record - caused FK violation
bug_fixed.fix: Added 'if not requester: raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="User not found")' after fetching requester profile
